rationale: The skill's primary verb is to create or restyle frontend interfaces, so a representative coding agent would inspect existing project structure and source/config files, then write or modify HTML, CSS, JS/TS, React/Vue component, public asset, and possibly package/config files. It may invoke the local frontend toolchain to install or use available libraries, run format/build/dev commands, and validate the UI. The text encourages distinctive typography and mentions React Motion when available, which implies possible font/CDN access and npm registry access if dependencies are installed.
